heading.title: A registration experience designed for trust and clarity
heading.description: This page pairs a clean registration form with benefits and FAQ content so people can decide quickly.

form.heading: Registration Form
form.message: Tell us about your interests and availability
form.successMessage: Thank you for registering as a volunteer. Our team will contact you shortly.

benefitsSection.title: Why volunteers join the trust
benefitsSection.description: Clear benefits make the volunteer path feel organized and worthwhile.

benefits: Certificates and reference letters for active volunteers.
Opportunities to lead specific campaign teams.

faqSection.title: Common questions answered simply
faqSection.description: A short FAQ reduces friction and improves conversion for volunteer signups.

faq.question: Do I need prior experience to volunteer?
faq.answer: No. We provide orientation, clear task assignments, and local team support for new volunteers.

faq.question: How often can I volunteer?
faq.answer: You can join one-time drives, monthly programs, or longer-term teams depending on availability.

faq.question: Will I receive a certificate?
faq.answer: Yes. Active volunteers can receive participation certificates and acknowledgements.
